protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Investigator-assessed PFS (3 comparisons: ITT imlunestrant vs SOC; ESR1m subpopulation imlunestrant vs SOC; ITT imlun+abema vs imlunestrant)
protocol_params.comparator: Investigator's choice of endocrine therapy (fulvestrant or exemestane) [Arm B SOC]
protocol_params.population: ER+/HER2- locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer, post-AI with or without CDK4/6i
protocol_params.design: Open-label, randomized, 3-arm, Phase 3 (EMBER-3)
stratification_factors: Prior CDK4/6i (yes vs no)
Presence of visceral metastases (yes vs no)
Region (East Asia vs North America/Western Europe vs Others)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ORR per BICR per RECIST v1.1 (in FDA primary efficacy population: Cohort 1 patients receiving zongertinib 120 mg QD with ≥1 prior systemic therapy, excluding prior HER2-targeted TKI or ADC)
protocol_params.population: Unresectable or metastatic non-squamous NSCLC with HER2 (ERBB2) TKD activating mutations, post ≥1 prior systemic therapy
protocol_params.design: Non-randomized, open-label, single-arm, multicenter, multi-cohort, first-in-human Phase 1/2 (Beamion LUNG-1, Study 1479-0001); accelerated approval
protocol_params.sample_size: N=71 (FDA primary efficacy population); N=75 (Applicant Cohort 1 full); pooled safety N=260

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ORR per BICR per RECIST v1.1 (confirmed; Extension part primary objective)
protocol_params.population: Advanced NSCLC harboring HER2 activating mutations (including ex20ins); Group D: prior systemic therapy, naïve to HER2 ex20ins-targeted therapy; Group E: prior systemic therapy with documented progression on HER2-targeted ADC
protocol_params.design: Non-randomized, open-label, single-arm, multicenter, multi-cohort, first-in-human Phase 1/2 (SOHO-01, Study 21607); accelerated approval
protocol_params.sample_size: N=81 (Group D, primary efficacy population); N=55 (Group E, supportive); N=357 (total study safety population)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS per BICR per RECIST v1.1 (dual primary with OS; PFS analysis conducted at first DCO)
protocol_params.comparator: Investigator's choice of chemotherapy (ICC: eribulin, capecitabine, vinorelbine, or gemcitabine)
protocol_params.population: Unresectable or metastatic HR+/HER2- breast cancer, ≥1 and ≤2 prior lines of chemotherapy in unresectable/metastatic setting, post-ET
protocol_params.design: Open-label, randomized, 1:1, Phase 3 (TROPION-Breast01)
stratification_factors: Number of previous lines of chemotherapy in inoperable/metastatic setting
Geographic region
Prior use of CDK4/6 inhibitor (yes vs no)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS per RECIST v1.1 assessed by IRC (key secondary: OS)
protocol_params.population: Previously untreated unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal junction (GEJ) adenocarcinoma; CLDN18.2-positive (≥75% of tumor cells, moderate-to-strong staining), HER2-negative
protocol_params.design: Double-blind, placebo-controlled, randomized, 1:1, multicenter, Phase 3 (two pivotal trials: SPOTLIGHT N=565; GLOW N=507)
stratification_factors: Region (Asia vs non-Asia)
Number of organs with metastatic sites (0-2 vs ≥3)
Prior gastrectomy (yes vs no)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ORR per BICR per RECIST v1.1
protocol_params.population: Multiple cohorts: (1) metastatic RET fusion-positive NSCLC treatment-naïve (n=39); (2) RET fusion-positive NSCLC post-platinum chemo (n=105); (3) RET-mutant MTC cabozantinib/vandetanib-naïve (n=88); (4) RET-mutant MTC post-cabozantinib/vandetanib (n=55); (5) RET fusion-positive thyroid cancer post-RAI (n=19); advanced solid tumors with RET gene alterations
protocol_params.design: Open-label, single-arm, multicenter, Phase 1/2 (LIBRETTO-001, Study LOXO-RET-17001); accelerated approval
protocol_params.sample_size: N=702 (overall safety population); multiple efficacy populations by tumor type/line (see above)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS per IRC per RECIST v1.1 (family of primary endpoints: ESR1-mut subpopulation and ITT population)
protocol_params.comparator: Investigator's choice SOC endocrine therapy (fulvestrant, anastrozole, letrozole, or exemestane)
protocol_params.population: ER+/HER2- advanced or metastatic breast cancer; postmenopausal women and men; prior CDK4/6i in combination with ET; 1-2 prior lines of endocrine therapy for mBC
protocol_params.design: International, multicenter, randomized, open-label, active-controlled, event-driven, 1:1, Phase 3 (RAD1901-308, EMERALD)
stratification_factors: ESR1 mutation status (detected vs not detected)
Prior treatment with fulvestrant (yes vs no)
Presence of visceral metastases (yes vs no)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS (dual primary endpoints: overall population and PIK3CA/AKT1/PTEN-altered population)
protocol_params.population: Locally advanced or metastatic HR+/HER2- breast cancer; progression on/after AI treatment; with or without prior CDK4/6i (CDK4/6i required for ≥51% of enrolled patients)
protocol_params.design: Double-blind, placebo-controlled, randomized, 1:1, multicenter, Phase 3 (CAPItello-291)
stratification_factors: Presence of liver metastases (yes vs no)
Prior CDK4/6 inhibitor use (yes vs no)
Geographic region (Region 1: US/Canada/Western Europe/Australia/Israel; Region 2: Latin America/Eastern Europe/Russia; Region 3: Asia)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: CR/CRh rate (complete remission + complete remission with partial hematologic recovery)
protocol_params.population: Adult patients with relapsed/refractory NPM1-mutant acute myeloid leukemia (R/R NPM1m AML)
protocol_params.design: Open-label, single-arm, multicenter, multi-cohort, Phase 1/2 (KO-MEN-001); Phase 2 portion is pivotal

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Overall survival (OS) in the ITT population
protocol_params.comparator: Investigator's choice (pembrolizumab, ipilimumab, or dacarbazine) — selected prior to randomization
protocol_params.population: HLA-A*02:01-positive adults with metastatic uveal melanoma (mUM) previously untreated in the metastatic setting
protocol_params.design: Open-label, randomized, 2:1, multicenter, Phase 3 (IMCgp100-202, Study 202)
protocol_params.sample_size: N=378 (tebentafusp N=252 randomized/245 treated; IC N=126 randomized/111 treated)
stratification_factors: LDH status (LDH >ULN vs LDH ≤ULN, measured centrally)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS per IRC per RECIST v1.1 (changed from investigator-assessed to IRC by protocol amendment)
protocol_params.population: Metastatic or recurrent, locally advanced nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC); no prior systemic chemotherapy for recurrent/metastatic disease
protocol_params.design: Multinational, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, 1:1, Phase 3 (JUPITER-02)
stratification_factors: ECOG performance status (0 vs 1)
Disease stage (recurrent vs metastatic)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Co-primary at Week 16: (1) proportion achieving sPGA 0 or 1 with ≥2-grade improvement from baseline; (2) proportion achieving PASI 75
protocol_params.comparator: Placebo and apremilast 30 mg BID (3-arm active comparator-controlled)
protocol_params.population: Adults with moderate to severe plaque psoriasis eligible for systemic therapy or phototherapy (sPGA ≥3, PASI ≥12, BSA ≥10%)
protocol_params.design: Randomized, double-blind, placebo- and active comparator-controlled, 2:1:1 (deucravacitinib:placebo:apremilast), multicenter, 52-week Phase 3 (two trials: IM011046 and IM011047)
protocol_params.sample_size: N=666 (IM011046); N=1020 (IM011047); combined N=1684 (excluding 2 excluded subjects)
stratification_factors: Geographic region (Trial IM011046: US/Japan/China/Rest of World; Trial IM011047: US/Rest of World)
Previous biologic use (yes vs no)
Body weight (≥90 kg vs <90 kg; not applied in Japan or China)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Dual primary endpoints: (1) remission at Week 26 (non-inferiority vs high-dose prednisone taper); (2) sustained remission at Week 52 (superiority)
protocol_params.comparator: Prednisone taper (starting 60 mg/day if ≥55 kg; tapered to 0 by Day 141) + background CYC or RTX
protocol_params.population: Adults with newly diagnosed or relapsing active ANCA-associated vasculitis (GPA or MPA); positive anti-PR3 or anti-MPO; eGFR ≥15 mL/min/1.73m²
protocol_params.design: Randomized, double-blind, active-controlled, 1:1, multicenter, 52-week Phase 3 (Study CL010_168)
stratification_factors: Background induction therapy (IV rituximab vs IV cyclophosphamide vs oral cyclophosphamide)
ANCA type (PR3 vs MPO)
Disease status (newly diagnosed vs relapsing)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Time to first severe asthma exacerbation
protocol_params.population: Subjects ≥12 years with moderate to severe asthma on background maintenance therapy (adults and adolescents; adult approval only by FDA)
protocol_params.design: Randomized, double-blind, active comparator-controlled, variable-length, event-driven, 1:1:1 (BDA 160/180 µg : BDA 80/180 µg : AS 180 µg) for subjects ≥12 years, Phase 3 (MANDALA)
stratification_factors: Age (≥12 to 17 vs ≥18 years)
Region
Number of severe exacerbations in prior year (1 vs >1)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: Sustained castration rate (testosterone <50 ng/dL from Week 5 Day 1 [Day 29] through 48 weeks)
protocol_params.comparator: Leuprolide acetate 3-month depot (22.5 mg; 11.25 mg in Japan/Taiwan/China) every 12 weeks
protocol_params.population: Men with androgen-sensitive advanced prostate cancer requiring ≥1 year of continuous ADT; including metastatic, biochemical relapse post-local therapy, and advanced localized disease
protocol_params.design: Multinational, randomized, open-label, parallel-group, 2:1 (relugolix:leuprolide), 48-week, Phase 3 (HERO, Study MVT-601-3201)
stratification_factors: Geographic region
Presence of metastatic disease (metastatic vs nonmetastatic)
Age

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS by blinded independent central review per RECIST v1.1
protocol_params.population: Adults ≥18 years with histologically confirmed desmoid tumor (DT) / deep fibromatosis with RECIST v1.1 progression ≥20% within 12 months of screening scan; treatment-naïve or recurrent/refractory
protocol_params.design: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, 1:1, multicenter, Phase 3 (NIR-DT-301)
stratification_factors: Target tumor location (intra-abdominal vs extra-abdominal)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ≥8-week RBC transfusion independence (RBC-TI)
protocol_params.population: IPSS low- or intermediate-1 risk MDS with transfusion-dependent anemia (≥4 RBC units/8 weeks at baseline); relapsed/refractory to or ineligible for ESA treatment
protocol_params.design: Double-blind, randomized, 2:1 (imetelstat:placebo), placebo-controlled, multicenter, Phase 3 (Study MDS3001-Part 2 / IMerge Phase 3)
stratification_factors: Prior RBC transfusion burden (≤6 vs >6 units RBC over 8 weeks)
IPSS risk group (low vs intermediate-1)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: PFS per BIRC (per RANO-LGG and modified RANO criteria)
protocol_params.comparator: Placebo (with crossover permitted from placebo to vorasidenib upon confirmed radiographic PD)
protocol_params.population: Adults and adolescents ≥12 years with residual or recurrent Grade 2 IDH1/IDH2-mutant oligodendroglioma or astrocytoma; surgical intervention as only prior anticancer therapy; most recent surgery 1-5 years before randomization
protocol_params.design: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled, 1:1, multicenter, Phase 3 (AG881-C-004, INDIGO)
stratification_factors: Local 1p19q status (co-deleted vs not co-deleted)
Baseline tumor size per local assessment (longest diameter ≥2 cm vs <2 cm)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ORR per BICR per RECIST v1.1
protocol_params.population: KRAS G12C-mutated locally advanced or metastatic NSCLC; ≥1 prior systemic therapy; at least one measurable lesion per RECIST v1.1
protocol_params.design: Open-label, single-arm, multicenter, multi-cohort, Phase 1/2 (CodeBreaK 100, Study 20170543); accelerated approval
protocol_params.sample_size: N=124 (primary efficacy population: NSCLC 960 mg QD with measurable lesion); N=427 (total solid tumor study enrollment)

protocol_params.primary_endpoint: ORR per BICR per RANO 2.0 criteria (integrated efficacy population)
protocol_params.population: Adult and pediatric patients with recurrent H3 K27M-mutant diffuse midline glioma (DMG); post-radiation therapy progression
protocol_params.design: Open-label, non-randomized, multicenter, single-arm across 5 completed Phase 2 studies (ONC006, ONC013, ONC014, ONC016, ONC018); integrated efficacy analysis; accelerated approval
protocol_params.sample_size: N=50 (integrated efficacy population meeting pre-defined criteria)
